detected.llm_rationale: Clean all-cash PE take-private (Altaris, healthcare-sim software; definitive agmt Jun 16). Break risk low — no antitrust angle, Altaris well-capitalised. But spread is only +0.65%, BELOW the 1% MIN_SPREAD floor: the market has already compressed it. No arb edge left to harvest — drop, don't deploy real capital + slippage for a near-certain 0.65%.

All-cash PE buyout (American Industrial Partners, $1.272B, 72% premium; definitive Apr 14, close H2-26 pending routine regulatory). Med-device, no plausible antitrust block; near-par price signals the market prices it near-certain. Spread +0.28% — essentially closed, far below the 1% floor. Drop: no residual spread.

All-cash PE take-private (Searchlight+Abry, $726M; definitive Feb 26, NO financing condition — a plus). Only residual risk is the majority-of-minority vote, but the ~700% premium all but guarantees approval. Old deal near close; spread +0.22%. Drop: spent spread, no edge.

Unsolicited/hostile third-party tender (Zodiac Partners II / Camac Fund, $46M) NOT a negotiated definitive merger agreement -- DXL's board formally recommended stockholders REJECT it, and the offer carries a financing contingency (ABL facility + $10M sponsor equity, not fully committed cash on hand). The ~26% spread is the market pricing a high probability of failure, not an uncaptured arb -- 'fat spread on a shaky deal is a trap.' No board support, no contractual floor. Drop.

detected.expected_close: unspecified (announced 2026-06-23, no financing contingency per press release)
detected.llm_rationale: Selectis Health (Black Pearl Equities, all-cash, no financing contingency per the 8-K) is otherwise a clean small-cap definitive agreement, but the target trades OTCQB and is NOT tradable at our broker (get_equity_quotes returns missing_instrument). Secondary sources disagree sharply on the live price ($2.97 vs $3.66 same-day) -- exactly the secondary-price-suspect case the house guards against; there is no broker tape to size against or execute on. Drop for lack of an executable venue, not for deal quality.

detected.expected_close_note: normalized to ISO best-estimate 2026-07-14 (audit 2026-07-10: non-ISO dates broke past-close semantics; held names use the sleeve's enter()-gated estimate)
detected.llm_rationale: Arcline (PE sponsor) definitive all-cash buyout, $272M EV, unanimous board approval, 209% premium to unaffected price -- strong signal no higher bid exists. NO financing condition (explicit in the merger agreement) removes the #2 break cause. Antitrust: Arcline is a financial sponsor, not a strategic competitor in aerospace/defense instrumentation or labeling/packaging -- low horizontal-overlap risk, though the reverse termination fee carve-out for antitrust-specific failure shows the parties contemplated *some* HSR risk (not zero, not high). Shareholder vote is the main open condition on a deal already this rich. Spread +1.74% over ~Q3 close (~3 months) is a real, uncaptured arb edge. Keep.

detected.llm_rationale: Cash+CVR deal ($4.00) but acquirer Kuva Labs has no committed financing and already paid to extend deadlines twice; the 22.7% spread is the market pricing a break, not a gift.
PREM14A is a capital-structure simplification / uplisting proxy, not an acquisition. No acquirer, no cash offer.
All-cash acquisition by Cambridge Savings Bank (~$7B mutual, cash on hand, no financing condition); definitive agreement, routine bank-regulatory approvals only. Cleanest spread in the set.
Clean all-cash deal (steute Technologies/Battery Ventures) but spread 0.78% is below the 1% MIN_SPREAD floor -- no edge left.
$18M asset sale (Marquee brands) plus preferred financing and an uncertain discretionary distribution -- not a bounded whole-company cash takeover.
Marchex is the ACQUIRER here (buying Archenia), not a takeover target. No short leg.
Selling its branded drug portfolio to Apotex for $100M cash (closed 7/1); company continues as a going concern, no per-share cash to holders.
All-stock reverse merger with Tenax Aerospace (Tenax holders get ~96%); AIRI also carries a going-concern warning. Not cash.
All-stock combination with Clywedog Therapeutics (new co "CLYD"). Not cash.
No acquisition found; PREM14A is a routine annual-meeting/authorization proxy, not a cash merger.
All-stock merger with Cathedra Bitcoin (0.123 ANY per Cathedra share). Real M&A but stock-for-stock, not cash.
All-cash go-private at $13.25 by Knox Lane (PE), but spread only 0.30% -- below MIN_SPREAD, no edge; prior Aya deal on this name already broke once.
Definitive all-cash deal with IKS, but spread ~0.06% -- fully priced, no edge left.
All-stock merger with Goldgroup Mining (1.4476 Goldgroup per GORO share). Not cash.
Cash-or-stock election with proration capping cash at <=30% of consideration -- predominantly stock, no clean short leg.
Board-approved plan of complete liquidation/dissolution, not an acquisition -- no acquirer, no bounded contractual close date.
$39M IP/asset sale to American Exchange Group followed by wind-down/dissolution; per-share undisclosed and clouded by a pending securities-fraud investigation. Not a cash takeover.

DEFM14A (2026-07-13) covers an all-STOCK merger of equals with Olin (0.5476 OLN per HUN share) forming OlinHuntsman, announced 2026-06-15; no cash consideration, no contractual dollar break-floor. Cash-only mandate disqualifies on structure. Close targeted H1 2027 with regulatory review still ahead. Drop.

PREM14A is NOT an acquisition: board approved a plan of complete liquidation and dissolution 2026-05-01, estimated distribution a very wide $0.61-$3.54/share. Form 25 filed, delisted from Nasdaq effective 2026-07-02 (not tradable at our broker). No acquirer, no offer, no floor. Drop.

DEFM14A is a stock-AND-cash election with The Real Brokerage (Canadian): $13.80 cash election PRORATED to a $60-80M aggregate cap, so the marginal holder receives 5.154 REAX shares - a stock deal with a small cash sleeve, no contractual cash floor. Today's +7.5% move has no confirmed topping bid behind it (losing Party C's nominal $15 was partly stock); reads as vote/arb positioning into the ~Aug-14 special meeting. The 21% notional gap to $13.80 is a proration trap, not arb edge. Drop.

Whole-company buyout by SoundHound AI, but common holders receive SoundHound Class A STOCK (aggregate ~$42.8M, SOUN collared $7-12 VWAP); only TASE-cleared holders get cash (capped $7.5M). Bolted to a $260M+ secured-note-into-stock restructuring that is a closing condition - distress-flavored stock-for-stock whose payoff floats with SOUN. No cash floor, high break risk. Drop.

DEFM14A is an all-STOCK merger with Somnigroup (0.1455 sh per LEG share, ~$2.5B, LEG holders ~9% of combined co); HSR waiting period already expired 2026-06-03 so regulatory risk is low, but pure stock - no cash consideration, no contractual dollar floor. Structure disqualifies for a cash-only book. Drop.

PREM14A 2026-07-14 is a Plan of Complete Liquidation and Dissolution, NOT a whole-company cash takeover -- ARI already sold its entire CRE loan portfolio to Athene for ~$9B (2026-04-24) and is self-liquidating with no third-party acquirer and no fixed cash offer, only an estimated $7.75-$8.50/sh total distribution paid in tranches through ~1H2028. At $10.70 the stock trades ABOVE the estimated distributions -- negative 'spread'. Out of scope (liquidation) and out of economics. Drop.
DEFM14A 2026-07-13 is an all-STOCK merger of equals with Equity Residential (AVB holders get 2.793 EQR/sh, no cash), and the target is a ~$27B mega-cap. Out of scope on both counts. Drop.
DEFM14A 2026-07-08 is a SPAC de-SPAC business combination (Inflection Point III + Air Water Ventures, share/earnout consideration). Not a cash takeover; unit unquotable at the broker. Drop.
DEFM14A 2026-07-07 is a SPAC de-SPAC (D. Boral ARC I + Exascale Labs) with BVI-to-Delaware domestication -- stock-based, not a cash takeover; unit unquotable at the broker. Drop.

De-SPAC: Allegro Merger Corp combining with SeeQC (~$1B EV + $65M PIPE); holders receive combined-company STOCK, not cash. SPAC trust-redemption play, out of scope; ALGR inactive at Robinhood. Drop: stock + SPAC + untradable.

DEFM14A is Amneal's own share-issuance vote to BUY Kashiv BioSciences ($375M cash + 28.9M AMRX shares + up to $350M contingent). AMRX is the ACQUIRER, not a target — no per-share cash offer to arb. Drop: not a target.

All-stock merger: each TMRC share converts to a pro-rata slice of 3,823,328 USA Rare Earth (USAR) shares (~$73M) consolidating the Round Top project. No cash floor; TMRC not tradable at Robinhood. Drop: stock + untradable.

No takeover of Ascend Wellness found; AAWH remains an independent cannabis MSO — the PREM14A is a routine/internal matter or a bolt-on BY Ascend, not a takeover of AAWH. Trades OTCQX/CSE, not tradable at Robinhood. Drop: no cash-target deal + untradable.

All-stock REIT combination (~$535M EV): each MDV COMMON converts to 1.975 GNL shares; only the Series A preferred (MDV-PA) gets $25.00 cash. Common is unhedged stock-ratio exposure, no cash floor. Drop: stock consideration.
All-share merger of equals with AkzoNobel (~$25B EV): 0.6539 AkzoNobel shares per AXTA share, no cash; large-cap cross-border. Drop: stock MoE + large-cap scope.

All-stock merger of equals with Equitable Holdings forming 'New Equitable' (~$22B combined, $1.5T AUM); no per-share cash, heavy state-insurance review. Same deal as the EQH row (two sides, deduped by CIK not economics). Drop: stock MoE + large-cap scope.
Other side of the Equitable/Corebridge all-stock MoE; EQH is effectively the surviving parent, not an arb target. No cash consideration, large-cap. Drop: stock MoE + large-cap scope + not a target.

Sun Pharma $14.00/sh ALL-CASH (PREM14A/DEFM14A + 8-K ex99.1), EV $11.75B; strategic acquirer, committed $12B bridge + $1B Sun funding, NO financing condition; $120M termination fee. Open conditions: shareholder vote + US/non-US antitrust and foreign-investment clearances (Indian acquirer), outside date 2027-01-26. +3.7% spread over ~6mo on a strategic cash deal is a real uncaptured edge; med break risk from the regulatory stack. Keep. LIVE: $575.00 filled 42.56138 sh @ 13.5099 (order 6a59032e).

Zydus cash tender $23.50/sh (topped Garda $18.00/$21.80); SC 14D9 + SC TO-T/A: tender expired 2026-06-15 with ~66.3% tendered, back-end merger completed, delisted. Closed before Hermes could read it — no live spread, no broker quote. Drop.

Apollo take-private at $5.03/sh cash via DEFM14C written consent (Onex >90% voting power consented 2026-05-09, no vote). Merger CLOSED 2026-07-14, NYSE delisted — no live spread, no broker quote. Drop.

NOT a control buyout: KKR Alternative Assets partial tender for only up to $150M of FSK at $11.00 (SC 14D9, board took no position; ~413K shares tendered, expired ~2026-06-11). Multi-billion BDC stays public; proration on a capped tender + spread +0.32% (<1% MIN_SPREAD). Fails the long-the-target-of-a-buyout scope. Drop.

Public Storage ~$10.5B ALL-STOCK acquisition of NSA (holders receive PSA shares; sweep hit the NSA-PB preferred) — no cash floor, fails CASH-only scope; also a mega-cap REIT combo, ~99.9% of votes cast approved, closing ~2026-07-22. Drop on consideration type.

Not a buyout: self-liquidation/MBO — sells 100% of assets (~$16M: $9M CGK option + $7M MBO APA), pays debts, redeems preferred, then a CONTINGENT illustrative $0.35-$0.45/sh distribution, no fixed offer; 10-K going-concern flag; OTC, no broker quote. Fails tradability and fixed-cash-offer. Drop.

Chiesi cash tender $27.00/sh (~$1.9B, no financing condition; SC 14D9 + SC TO-T/A): expired 2026-06-10 with ~77.8% tendered, merger closed 2026-06-11, Nasdaq delisted. Closed before detection — no live spread. Drop.

Ligand acquired XOMA Royalty at $39.00/sh cash + 1 non-transferable CVR (75% of net Janssen-litigation proceeds), ~$739M (DEFM14A; sweep hit XOMAP preferred). Closed 2026-07-14, common delisted. Per the CVR rule the bet would have been the cash leg only, but it's gone — no live spread. Drop.

ARCHIMED take-private $3.16/sh cash + CVR (up to $100M milestones); HSR cleared 06-15, vote 07-08, COMPLETED 2026-07-13, delisted (broker instrument inactive). Closed before Hermes could read it - no live spread. Drop.
Angelini Pharma $31.50/sh all-cash ($4.1B, no financing condition); vote 07-08 (98.6% for), COMPLETED pre-market 2026-07-15, delisted (broker inactive). Closed before detection. Drop.

TopBuild WAS the target (QXO ~$17B) but consideration was $505 cash OR 20.200 QXO shares with proration (MIXED, not all-cash), mega-cap and fully arbitraged, and it CLOSED ~2026-07-01 after the 06-29 vote (broker inactive). Triple out of scope. Drop.

Real Asset Acquisition Corp. (CIK 0002052161, no resolved ticker) - blank-check SPAC; the DEFM14A is a de-SPAC business-combination/extension proxy, not a cash takeover of an operating target. Out of scope. Drop.

Cantor Equity Partners I - blank-check SPAC; DEFM14A is a de-SPAC business-combination vote, not a takeover of an operating target (still trades ~$10.65 near trust). Out of scope. Drop.
